creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
It's still there:



configure: error: The following required libraries were not found:
     libgif/libungif
Maybe some development libraries/packages are missing?
If you don't want to link with them give
     --with-gif=no
as options to configure
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to ashish@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel/work/emacs-24.0.93.107364/config.log" including
the output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea
to provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. an `ls
/var/db/pkg`).
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20120224-82395-k7ezld-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=emacs-24.0.90.106240_1,1 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=24.0.90.106240_1,1 make BATCH=yes
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! editors/emacs-devel (emacs-24.0.90.106240_1,1)        (configure error)
